name: X509Certificate_SetValidTo
title: X509Certificate_SetValidTo
description: Setter function for the Valid To (NotAfter) field of the X.509 Certificate handle. String supports ASN.1 UTCTime or ASN.1 GeneralizedTime representation.

parameters.name: objectHandle
parameters.description: (in) Handle with type 'X509Certificate'. The function will be called in context of this handle.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
